{{Quote|You ''have'' to know, Tu'ala…why you would sacrifice ''yourself'' for another… It ''isn't'' that the Force loves you ''less'' than other creatures… It is that ''you'' love other creatures more.|[[Zuth]]|<ref name="TL" />}}
'''Tu'ala''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the decade marked by the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] which plagued the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Tu'ala was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], studying at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Selected to train as the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Zuth]], Tu'ala constructing a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to wield on her missions with her master. One of Zuth's most important lessons he taught to Tu'ala was his explanation that sometimes the death of a single individual was necessary to ensure others could fulfill their destiny; a lesson Tu'ala had trouble understanding. She lost her Master some time prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], when he died saving some politicians from attempted assassination.<ref name="TL" />

Obtaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Tu'ala was part of [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] [[Jedi assault team/Legends|Jedi strike team]] sent to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] to rescue Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist Council/Legends|leaders]] just prior to the start of the Clone Wars in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. At the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], she finally gained comprehension of Zuth's meaning and laid down her own life, taking a shot from a [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] soldier that was meant for Anakin Skywalker. Her effort went unnoticed and unappreciated; nevertheless, her deed allowed Skywalker to live on and, eventually, to destroy [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] and return balance to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="TL" />
